title: pigea adpressa
side_effects: Pigea adpressa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, especially in individuals with sensitive stomachs. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to liver and kidney damage due to the presence of toxic compounds. Additionally, improper use of Pigea adpressa can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues in some individuals. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for any medicinal purposes.
